description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Airtable table by enumerating bases × tables via the Meta API. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset reads records via the Records API and emits a DataFrame with flattened fields.

pat_env_var.label: Personal Access Token Env Var
pat_env_var.description: Env var with an Airtable Personal Access Token (create at airtable.com/create/tokens with data.records:read + schema.bases:read scopes).

table_selector.label: Table Selector
table_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector matching against 'BaseName.TableName' (or just TableName).
